note: Subset of data/eval/test_queries.jsonl (the 31-query labeled set). For in_corpus: after the answer, print labeled source vs cited pages, hit or miss. For out_of_corpus: the known answer is a decline. Ship in rag_engineering_assistant/frontend/.

queries.query: What is the First Law of Thermodynamics and what principle is it referred to as?
Why is enthalpy given with respect to a reference value, and what reference is used for water?
What is the log mean temperature difference and why is it used in heat exchanger calculations?
What type of motion does a gate valve use and why is pressure drop low across an open gate valve?
What is the difference between a relief valve and a safety valve?
What is the purpose of the Critical Design Review according to the NASA Systems Engineering Handbook?
What must a hot work permit document under the PSM standard?
When did compliance with the amended energy conservation standards for residential central air conditioners become required?
What minimum outdoor air ventilation rates does ASHRAE Standard 62.1 require for office spaces?
What is the global warming potential of R-410A and when does the EPA HFC phasedown restrict it in new residential systems?
